programmes.show_description: What Makes Shamy Run?: Drama series. Dave at the Winchester Arms points out that the banknotes given to Arthur by Shamy to pay off his debts are actually forgeries.
Shopping from home.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1970s - from horse racing to table football and Formula One to darts - that includes many memorable moments.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Pilgrim of Hate: One last adventure for the medieval sleuthing monk. When the corpse of an old man is discovered in a sack at the Abbey, Cadfael believes that the man was murdered.
Action from the day's games in the Football League, including Huddersfield v Cardiff, Bradford v Plymouth, Northampton v Barnsley and Rotherham v Luton in League One.
We reach the much-anticipated climax of the 1977-78 season as the First Division trophy is lifted and the action includes West Ham facing the risk of relegation against Liverpool.
Vampires of the Deep: Extreme fishing series. Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest to find an ancient river monster that is said to attack swimmers.
Meet the family firm making traditional haggis, learn what goes into making a set of bowls, discover how wheelbarrows are made and meet a team who make classic brogue shoes.
Henry Cole takes a wild ride through Gran Canaria, Henry and Sam hunt for a rare 1970s Chopper to restore, and Henry visits the Morgan factory to learn about their three wheelers.
Sharpe's Company: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Spain 1812 - Wellesley, who is now the Duke of Wellington, sets his sights on Badajoz as Sharpe is reunited with Teresa.
Sharpe's Enemy: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Captain Sharpe is assigned the task of delivering a ransom to a horde of deserters who have taken two Englishwomen hostage.
Live coverage from the NHL as the New York Rangers take on the Florida Panthers at Madison Square Garden.
Crisp N Dry and Acoustic Guitars: Learn how yellow rapeseed flowers are turned into oil, then meet craftsmen harking back to the golden age of guitar making.
Last Orders: Richard Henwood takes a look back at The Indoor League, a TV show featuring 1970s pub games and presented by Yorkshire cricketing great Fred Trueman.
A selection of nine-dart finishes from ITV Sport's darts coverage - every darts player strives to produce one, and this prowess is even more impressive in front of the TV cameras.
A short sports film about the legendary racehorse.
Comedy legend Lee Mack hosts the ultimate leveller of a game show - 100 contestants will start, but who will make it to the end to try to win up to 100,000 pounds?
Disturbingly dark horror film starring Christian Bale and Reese Witherspoon, 2000. A wealthy New York City investment banker delves into violent and hedonistic fantasies.
Latest news from the world of entertainment.
Disturbingly dark horror film starring Christian Bale and Reese Witherspoon, 2000. A wealthy New York City investment banker delves into violent and hedonistic fantasies.
Long Shot: Action-packed drama series. The team protect a visiting American diplomat from a renowned hitman who is holding a young girl captive and has the dignitary in his sights.
Historic Rescue: Reality series. Matt and his team are thousands of kilometres from home as they embark on their most ambitious adventure yet and get creative for an historic rescue.
Crisp N Dry and Acoustic Guitars: Learn how yellow rapeseed flowers are turned into oil, then meet craftsmen harking back to the golden age of guitar making.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
Shopping from home.
Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season including highlights of Arsenal vs Aston Villa, Grimsby Town vs Wolves, and Bristol City vs Bristol Rovers.
Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season including Everton vs Sheffield Wednesday, Coventry City vs Tottenham Hotspur, and Leeds United vs Wimbledon.
This Island Isn't Big Enough...: Classic US action drama series. Thomas, TC and Higgins search for Rick and a boatload of passengers who have gone missing at sea during a cruise.
Black Thorn: Classic US detective drama. Theo has another run-in with bounty hunter Salathiel Harris when he returns to New York in pursuit of a bail jumper.
Trial and Error: Classic drama. Ken tries to be a good Samaritan - but lands himself in trouble - when he tries to help a group of tenants being evicted by a ruthless landlord.
One of Your Own: Tough 1970s police drama series. Carter winds up behind bars when he attempts to find the proceeds of a jewellery robbery.
Carnage City: US robot combat series. Rusty is back and hopes that his mum's popcorn bowl will provide protection against deadly new flipper Blip, and Bloodsport faces Whiplash.
Way of the Stalking Horse: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is shot and left for dead by a hitman who hired him to investigate a bogus missing persons case.
Where Do You Go When You Have No Place to Go?: Classic US detective drama. A Native American is mistaken for a burglar by a company president and ends up accidentally killing him.
Cover Up: Classic drama. A neighbour of Ken asks him to investigate a sudden change in character in her son, and Harry attempts to learn Norwegian for some incoming visitors.
Hearts and Minds: Tough 1970s police drama series. Regan and Carter become involved in a plot to stop a foreign head of state gaining access to a pill that can fight heart disease.
Second Hand Pose: Drama series. After being left in an industrial freezer, Terry looks for alternative employment and gets work helping out in the second-hand furniture business.
Sharpe's Company: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Spain 1812 - Wellesley, who is now the Duke of Wellington, sets his sights on Badajoz as Sharpe is reunited with Teresa.
Iconic action drama film starring Tom Cruise and Kelly McGillis, 1986. A daring young pilot in the US Navy's elite fighter weapons school learns things not taught in the classroom.
Latest news from the world of entertainment.
Iconic action drama film starring Tom Cruise and Kelly McGillis, 1986. A daring young pilot in the US Navy's elite fighter weapons school learns things not taught in the classroom.
Oscar-winning boxing drama film starring Sylvester Stallone and Talia Shire, 1976. A small-time boxer gets a chance at glory when he is challenged by a heavyweight champion.
